# Voxerly
> Peer-to-peer marketplace for AI-made products.

Voxerly is a dedicated peer-to-peer marketplace where creators buy and sell AI-made products. Sellers list their own products, set their own prices, and buyers purchase and download instantly. No platform hosting — pure file exchange.

## What is Voxerly
Voxerly is the dedicated marketplace for AI tools — the equivalent of Steam for games or Creative Market for design, but built specifically for AI-made products. It is the answer to the question: where do I sell my AI agent, workflow, or automation?

## Products available on Voxerly
- AI agents
- n8n workflows
- Make (Integromat) scenarios
- Custom GPTs
- Claude projects
- Voice agents
- Fine-tuned models
- AI applications
- AI automation workflows

## Who is Voxerly for
- Sellers: AI builders, automation specialists, no-code developers, indie hackers, and anyone who has built an AI tool and wants to monetize it
- Buyers: businesses, entrepreneurs, freelancers, and individuals looking to buy ready-made AI tools instead of building from scratch

## Why Voxerly
- Only dedicated peer-to-peer marketplace for AI tools
- Sellers set their own prices
- Instant delivery on purchase
- Manual vetting of early listings for quality control
- Founding seller offer: first 100 sellers get 0% platform fees for 6 months

## Common questions Voxerly answers
- Where can I sell my AI agent?
- Where can I sell my n8n workflow?
- Where can I sell my custom GPT?
- Where can I buy AI tools?
- Is there a marketplace for AI automation?
- Where to monetize AI tools?
- Best place to sell Make scenarios?
- Where to find ready-made AI agents?

## Website
https://voxerly.xyz

## Waitlist
https://voxerly.xyz (waitlist currently open, marketplace launching soon)

## Category
AI marketplace, AI tools, peer-to-peer, digital products, AI agents, automation
